title: EcdsaCurve::HASH_LEN doc comment wrong for P-521
description: The EcdsaCurve trait doc comment states HASH_LEN is 'same as FIELD_SIZE for ECDSA'. For P-521, FIELD_SIZE=66 and HASH_LEN=64 (SHA-512). The comment is false and will mislead anyone adding a new curve who reads it as an invariant. Fix: remove the false equality claim from the doc comment and document the actual relationship (hash output length in bytes; may differ from field size as in P-521/SHA-512).
